MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: In the last six months and compared to others of the same age, how well does each of the following statements describe your behavior/feelings? Please try to answer all questions.
MeasurementToolMetadata.Notes: Irritability scale. Items 1-6 are the symptom items (0-2); item 7 is an impairment item and is NOT included in the scored totals.

ari_3.Description: Stay angry for a long time

ari_score_avg.Description: ARI mean score: mean of items ari_1-ari_6 (each 0-2). Item ari_7 (impairment) is excluded. n/a if any of items 1-6 is missing.

ari_score_total.Description: ARI total score: sum of items ari_1-ari_6 (each 0-2; range 0-12). Item ari_7 is excluded. n/a if any of items 1-6 is missing.
